creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've looked into the configure script of the ldb* and found that it's quite broken in finding LDAP libs location. But fixing it properly is pretty complex task, so I used John's approach with some fixes and add --with-openldap switch to the configure.

That should be updated shortly, but you can see the patch(es) in the:

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=226019
